provenance: Measured on real BrainScaleS-2 silicon via EBRAINS (lab.jsc.ebrains.eu), EBRAINS-25.10 kernel, stable quiggeldy servers. Chip hxcube7fpga3chip61_1, hagen (analog-MAC) calibration ebrains-stable. hxtorch.perceptron.matmul; 128 repeats per point; input value 15 on 100 active rows, 128 output neurons.

self_check.note: batched-repeat noise matches separate-call noise -> each repeat is an independent hardware integration
